entry.title: Re: How to restrict outbound delivery with respect to ser...
entry.content:
The material which use the serial number, it must be assigned a serial number profile (In material material data: MM03 -> "work scheduling" or "General Plant Data / Storage 1" , the serial number profile will be maintained), pls check the background configuration of "serial number profile".

T-code: OIS2

Path： Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-> Master Data in Plant Maintenance and Customer Service-> Technical Objects-> Equipment -> Serial Number Management->Define Serial Number Profiles

And Check the filed of “Stock” whether is “2”, when you choose "2" for this filed, it will check the stock exist or not.

entry.title: Enhancing Financial Management with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3
entry.content:
As professionals in the advanced realm of SAP, it is crucial to keep abreast of the developments that can significantly impact your business processes. The latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 (HFC9) release introduces vital enhancements in Finance, focusing specifically on Management Accounting and Margin Analysis.

Advanced Substitution/Validation Hierarchies

This release introduces a notable feature within the [Substitution/Validation Hierarchies]. The feature is designed to provide a more rigorous framework for financial verification through the "Manage Substitution/Validation Rules - Journal Entries" application. This functionality now allows users to meticulously assess Journal Entry Items against defined node hierarchies in Cost Centers and GL Accounts. The feature enhances the integrity of financial processes by ensuring compliance with organizational standards and structures.

With this addition, financial controllers can verify that any cost center or general ledger account used in journal entries aligns with defined hierarchies. This is essential for maintaining the accuracy and reliability of financial postings, thereby upholding the quality and precision of financial management.

Comprehensive Management of Allocations

The updated [“Manage Allocations (New Version) (F3338A)” app] offers a sophisticated solution for managing allocation cycles. This feature builds on the capabilities of its predecessor by providing an improved, clearer interface that enhances user experience while maintaining robust control over financial allocations.

Users are now able to view a full overview of allocation cycles and their associated segments with enhanced visualization. While no modifications can be made in the new version to preserve data integrity, all pertinent details are readily accessible for analysis. Financial managers still have the flexibility to switch to the previous version when adjustments are necessary, ensuring that your financial operations remain adaptable to your unique business needs.

This new version allows you to display cycles and segments, but not change them. To make changes to allocation cycles, continue using Manage Allocations (F3338).

 

Conclusion: 

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.3 release continues to fortify SAP's commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions for financial management. By incorporating these advanced features into your organizational workflows, businesses can strive towards a future of enhanced efficiency, accuracy, and strategic financial insight. Integrating these enhancements paves the way for more streamlined financial processes, offering unprecedented control and visibility.

For any organization aiming to stay ahead in the competitive business landscape, leveraging these features is essential to achieve superior financial management outcomes.

For any further assistance or queries, feel free to contact your SAP consultant or reach out to the SAP community for additional insights.

entry.title: pcr payroll
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Please help. Im new to PCR and learning the basics. 

I need to write a PCR to read amount from a certain wage type (ex: WT 1000) in input table and multiply it with the number of any other wage type(ex: WT 1001) and store in WT1000. if the amount is greater than 50,000 then add it to output table. 

*

****

1001

ADDWT&NUM

ADDWT*

1000 

ADDWT&AMT

MULTI NAA

ADDWT *

AMT>50000

ADDWT*

i wrote this and it doesnt work.

entry.title: How to configure T042E_WANFF(Number of Days Until Bill of Exchange Pmnt Request Due Date)
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I would appreciate it so much if you would take the time to read and answer my question. 


■Customer requirement
I'm currently customizing the bill of exchange process for Japan in S/4HANA Public Cloud. The customer requirement is to change the due date for BOE payable (see the table below) based on vendors. The span from the posting date can be 1 to 3 months, but it depends on the vendors. (In the case of the table below, the span is 1 month.)
 

MMDDYYYYActionDue Date
12/16/2024Posting an invoice with the payment method O(for BOE)01/31/2025
01/31/2025Running an Automatic Payment Program to post a BOE for the invoice02/28/2025
02/28/2025Clearing the BOE-

 

 


■How I'm trying to deal with it 
For this requirement, I'm currently trying to configure T042E_WANFF in Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions(101044) so that I can configure the span for each payment method and then properly assign them to vendors.
■The problem that I have
Is there any way for activating this item? It seems perferct for this requirement, but somehow unavailable to change right now.(Please refer to the image attached.)


Another option would be to maintain terms of payment to have two dates : one is for the invoice, and the other is for the BoE.

Thank you,


Kaito

Hi

entry.title: View the execution plan of SAC widgets/ charts
entry.content:
Hello experts,
   I currently using SAC with a Live Connection to my SAP HANA database. When I create a Chart in SAC to view my data, sometimes I get the error "Fail to fetch data" (It has occurred randomly, not all the times) <See the image attached below>.
   The chart is about getting the Top 5 Best Sales Products by Quantity. The data source has about 2 million rows of data, and the Chart also uses the filter to remove the unnecessary products. I wonder whether the errors occurred because my server did not meet the resource requirement to query the data or because it was a SAC issue. So I want to view the execution plan, and query of each Chart/ Widget to run that query under my HANA server. Is there any solution? ( I found that SAC only has the Analyze Story Performance in View Time option to track the time of each Widget, but does not have the execution plan).
I appreciate your help.
Best regards,

Nguyen Thanh Hieu

entry.title: How to multiple email ids of vendor in RltdRmtInf in DMEE File
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,I am an FICO Consultant.I have a query in DMEE.
We are generating DMEE payment files of vendors to the bank.
Banks requested us to give payment information and vendor details(like vendor account no ,name and email id and country).

RltdRmtInf

(RmtLctnMtd(value is EMAL,its constant value),RmtLctnElctrncAdr(email address of vendor),Nm(Name) and Ctry(Country)).

for each vendor there are 3-6 emails ids to vendor.

My requirement is to display 3 email or 6 email ids of vendor in DMEE file.

Here I used RltdRmtInf its coming for 1 time ie first email id of vendor is displaying. ABAPer has put the logic to get emailids from ADR6 and LFA1 table based on vendor account but its not coming
for multiple emails ids.

Do i need to write the logic in conditions tab or anything, please let me know?

Thanks,
Geetha R.

entry.title: ABAP CDS VIEW TO FETCH SUM OF QTY FROM MSEG TABLE FOR ALL ITEMS WITH RESPECT TO GIVEN INPUT
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have a requirement to fetch the summation of Quantity from mseg table, menge is the field for quantity , shkzg is the field considered for Credit / Debit i.e., if it is "H" then we consider that item as Credit and if it is "S" then it is Debit. Please find the below 

 

define view ZTEST_MSEG_VIEWNAME as select from mseg 
 
{
key matnr as Matnr,
werks as Werks,
lgort   as Lgort,
menge as Quantity,
shkzg as CreditDebitInd,
count(*)   as totalCount,
case 
when shkzg = 'H' then (menge * 1)
when shkzg = 'S' then (menge * -1)
end as creditDebitQuantity
} 
where matnr = 'XXXXXXXXI.' and werks = 'XX4' and lgort = 'XXEN'  
group by matnr,werks,lgort,menge,shkzg

We created one more cds view to take the summation of the creditDebitQuantity as show below 

define view ZINV_MSEG_SUM_VIEWNAME as select from ZTEST_MSEG_VIEWNAME 

{ 
key  Matnr as Matnr,
key  Werks as Plant,
key  Lgort as Location,
 CreditDebitInd as CreditDebit,
sum(creditDebitQuantity ) as TOTAL_QTY
 
} 
where Matnr = 'XXXXXXXX.' and Werks = 'XX4' and Lgort = 'XXEN'

group by Matnr,Werks,Lgort,CreditDebitInd

on Executing the above we are getting summation of quantity as show below 

which shows that total Credit Quantity is 349 and Total Debit Quantity is 71 but this is not in sync with the summation count displayed at the MSEG Table in S/4 HANA SYSTEM. please find the below 

The sum of menge for items having value as "H" in column shkzg is 1065 and the sum of menge for items having value as "S" in column shkzg is 1075.  for given material, plant and lgort. 

please do the need full, as the ABAP CDS View should also display the same output as 1065 & 1075 , but instead it is displaying 71 & 349 respectively  

Thank you

entry.content:
Hi,

Check if SAP note 1224747 is relevant for your case.

If yes, you need to contact SAP Support via the support launchpad to get the issue investigated.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: How to group the multiple rental units into different...
entry.content:
Hi Sridhar,

If you need to separate out different Rental Objects you would normally use the Rental Object Type for that. The benefit is that this will allow you to control which rental object types can be used for which contract types. The disadvantage is that this attribute is static and cannot be changed afterwards in case the RO is reconfigured from Senior to Junior in your case. 

If you are referring to grouping for RO's on the contract itself (e.g. 1 contract with 3 Junior RO's and 4 Senior RO's) you can use the "Object Group" to setup a "senior" and "junior" group. You'll have to update the config for "allowed assignment objects per object type" and specify object type IL for the respective contract types.

Regards, Andre

entry.title: Re: Approval check availability for App "Manage Budget Document - Project" in S4 Hana Publ
entry.content: Hi Sai, Do we have any alternate solution to achieve this workflow? I do not see API the way i see for the Project budget workflow process.

entry.title: Re: pcr payroll
entry.content:
You have to write Two PCRS and they should be as per below 

1001

ADDWT*

ADDWT&NUM

1000 

NUM=&  NUM

MULTI NAA

ADDWT *

Write the above two PCRs and revert with your results here we will go to the next one once you achieve the above one

Here Number from WT 1000 will be multiplied with Amount in WT 1001  , Ensure you have inserted the PCR with PIT and check the output of each PCR.

DM me in case of any issue

entry.content:

I created a MIG with a custom X12 structure. When I tried to use this in trading partner agreement and activate it , I am getting the below error.

Error was : Failed to publish Message Implementation Guideline with id 4b6dd29d12024347b1d9b875c1c2b345 to Partner Directory. Error was : Error executing [PUSH_TO_PD] on service [SAP Integration Advisor]. Response was [Code: 500, Reason : Internal Server Error : {"errorCode":"FAILED_TO_PUSH_ARTIFACT_TO_CPI","errorMessage":"Cannot invoke \"com.sap.it.spc.smarti.ica.exporter.util.ArtifactHolder.getContent()\" because \"msgXsd\" is null"}]

Can anyone please help ?

entry.content:

take a look at SAP note 507662. Perhaps it will solve your problem.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: custom filter not working
entry.content:
Hello Mike,

The filter you have added is it a page filter?
Can you make sure that the filter is applied to/connected to the required widgets you want the filter to work on.

Please see Work with the Linked Widgets Diagram (Optimized) | SAP Help Portal
This will help in seeing if the filter is connected to the required widgets

BR
Sumit

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
I think you need to use "join with internal tab" (as you pointed INNER ITAB_CDS) if the system version allowed (directly with MARD, not via CDS). It should resolve the restriction with FAE (full code is here).

And it seems ( maybe I am wrong ) that we could not resolve only by cds. we should either: do extra calculation on application server  or do join itab (as new feature).

 

        TYPES: BEGIN OF ts_matnr_werks
            , matnr TYPE matnr18
            , werks TYPE werks_d
          , END OF ts_matnr_werks
          , tt_matnr_werks_srt TYPE sorted TABLE OF ts_matnr_werks WITH UNIQUE key matnr werks
          .

     data lt_tab_matnr_srt TYPE tt_matnr_werks_srt.
     FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_tab_matnr> TYPE ts_matnr_werks.

    " just to prepare sorted table
    loop at mt_tab_matnr ASSIGNING <fs_tab_matnr>.
      INSERT <fs_tab_matnr> INTO TABLE lt_tab_matnr_srt.
    ENDLOOP.

    select z1~matnr, sum( labst ) as stock
        FROM zmard as z1
          join @LT_tab_matnr_srt as z2
        on z1~matnr eq z2~matnr
        and z1~werks eq z2~werks
      WHERE z1~lgort in @s_lgort
      GROUP BY z1~matnr
      INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_stock)
      .

entry.title: Re: Checking Control
entry.content:
Greetings,

it all comes down to the question if you want to perform material availability during production order release. If you want to perform this check you must select the indicator. Otherwise, leave it unselected.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: FORM TEMPLATE FOR OUTGOING CHECK IN SAP S/4HANA, PUBL...
entry.content: Hi customer, Good Day! Now there is no specific template for outgoing check for the Philippines. So we suggest you use the standard one. If you want to have a specific template, your cooperation to submit a new feature request will be highly appreciated. 2807810 - What is Support issue – What is Feature Request: Cloud Solutions 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product

entry.title: Supplier Quotation for Partail items in RFQ
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I have the same question as the one in the following post, but the answer provided there does not fully address my concern:

Creating Supplier Quotation for Partial Items in RFQ

It is common that some vendors only provide quotations for a subset of the items listed in an RFQ. How can I create a supplier quotation for only the items that the vendor has quoted?

Thank you!

Haily Huang

another noticed is regarding Blending 

 

it is stated blending not there in optimize mode available only in classic design stories  whereas in Optimize story design for Chart i can see data blending option is enable but for table it is disable.

 

can you please correct me if i am wrong.

 

Thanks

Suraj

IBM

you need to pass FU key, it will take care of creating text at FU level..

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to search a dynamic attribute as a cri...
entry.content: Yes, Solr support for Backoffice is available. You can find more details in the documentation for Solr Search in Backoffice. To enable it, you may need to make some configuration and widget changes in Backoffice, as well as updates to the Solr configuration (the one with description "SolrSearchConfig for backoffice").

entry.title: Re: Multiple receiver routing in SAP PI/PO
entry.content:
Hi Dileep,

You can select multiple channels based on your operational mapping and whichever Business component you have used for the same need to create required channel and select on outbound processing tab.

entry.title: Re: SAP PI REST-Sender Adapter Custom Error Handling Expr...
entry.content:
I think the JSON element in your JSON expression is wrong, it should be errorReply.status without $

see an example in this blog post

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/pi-rest-adapter-custom-error-handling/ba-p/13280280

Alex

entry.title: Re: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content:
Have you heard of „Read Access Logging“ (RAL)?

RAL is able to log data which has left the system at one of its external interfaces (RAL speaks of channels).

This might be of interest for you.

 

Regards and Merry Xmas, Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: BW reporting preview freezes in Eclipse
entry.content:

it works in RSRT and it works if I use the "copy URL" button in the Eclipse preview window and paste it in Chrome, only the Eclipse preview window freezes.
By the way - if I had known before I had used the "copy URL" earlier  😄    data load in Chrome seems to me much faster than in Eclipse...

cheers
Mathias

entry.title: theoretical question: a tiny portion of hdb00003/datavolume_0000.dat is lost
entry.content:
Consider this as a theoretical question.  

Customer's HANA database is down. Their indexserver data volume hdb00003/datavolume_0000.dat  is 50GB in size. 

Log file shows there is input/output error when loading indexserver data volume. 

A disk problem is found, there is a bad sector.  Customer recovered the file with ddrescue. dd rescue shows that 16kb is lost.  

There is no backup of any kind. don't even think about it.  

Server has been rebooted. HANA won't start up anymore. 

Is there hope for recovering some data at all? They don't care about data consistency anymore at this point. I would compare this scenario to pulling a brick off of a skyscraper. In my naive opinion, it's a bit ridiculous to say it's impossible to salvage any data at all.

entry.title: Re: error handling on process automation BPA with NO RPA

we created the default Route, system is picking default route in FU level.

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoices for Malaysia: A Guide for Communication Settings
entry.content:
@gerhardhoebinger, @kevin_qiu: I've consulted the expert about Gerhard's question. See her answer below:

Either secret 1 or 2 should work. Just pick one to maintain on BTP.

The reason MY government gave more than one secret was to provide a backup mechanism when call rate of API exceeds limit.

entry.title: OpenText Services auxsrvr and bksrvr can not start automatically after a system restart
entry.content:
Actually we did a Linux suse upgrade , after upgrading, the services didn't start automatically. 

Does any one can suggest the reason and whether we can make it automatically start after a system restart.

entry.title: In asset master data quantity field need to be editable while creating the master data
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating asset master data in S4hana public cloud user needs to give quantity so that while creating Purchase order quantity should not be exceeded than what has been mentioned in the master data.

Now while creating asset master data quantity field is showing grayed out.

Please guide me on this issue to resolve.

entry.title: Re: CPI: Mail is not formatted, no style
entry.content: @leon_potgieter I found a solution that involves using a script. I am using javax.mail.*. Inside, there is a MimeMessage, and you can essentially search for different MIME types and capture the one that has the style.

entry.title: Integration Advisor – Support of xCBL Messages
entry.content:
We are pleased to announce that the B2B Library of xCBL Messages is now available as part of our predefined Type System content in Integration Advisor of SAP Integration Suite. Additionally, we have also added support for default namespace handling in Integration Advisor. In this blog post I would like to give you a short overview of these related topics.


The picture above depicts the overall building blocks of Integration Advisor. This blog post mainly relates to the Type Systems (B2B Library) area.

xCBL Messages

The xCBL.org organization had defined a collection of XML Message Types for B2B transactions back in the 2000s. For more background on xCBL you can refer to the xCBL.org homepage (Link). Although these message types are not extended anymore by xCBL.org, many customers still use them and wished to have them included in Integration Advisor.

Integration Advisor now provides 3 versions of xCBL, from 3.0 up to 4.0:

 
This offering contains 50 distinct business message types such as Order, Invoice or AdvanceShipmentNotice:

 
Please note that in xCBL each version comes with a different namespace. In the XML world, name + namespace form together a unique identifier for each object. As a result, each Business Message Type (such as Order or Invoice) is listed multiple times, once for each namespace. In the screenshot above, you can see the Order message type listed three times, corresponding to three different namespaces (= one for each version).   

A few technical notes for xCBL

The xCBL library defines proprietary codelists CountryCode, RegionCode, CurrencyCode and LanguageCode. Although very similar these codelists differ from the corresponding ISO standard codelists ISO_3166-1, ISO_3166-2, ISO_4217 and ISO_639-1. The codes in these xCBL codelists are typically from the end of the 1990s and thus not up to date. Moreover, xCBL offers the additional code Other to support the usage of any non-ISO code.

In Integration Advisor we have chosen the following design: All according nodes refer to the xCBL codelists by default because this is in accordance to the xCBL standard definition. In addition, we have added the corresponding ISO standard codelists as secondary codelists. This way, you can easily switch to the ISO codelists with a few clicks in your Message Implementation Guideline (MIG). 

The xCBL library uses an xCBL-specific format (called xcblDatetime) for date and time information (e.g. 20241215T11:00:00+01:00). It is very similar to the standard ISO-8601 format (e.g. 2024-12-15T11:00:00+01:00) but does not use the hyphens.

In Integration Advisor, we have added an additional date time format for xcblDatetime - this allows you to use our Date Time Conversion for such date/time values as well. The xCBL library also uses an xCBL-specific format (called xcblDate) for date information (e.g. 20241215) - in difference to ISO-8601 format (e.g. 2024-12-15) again without hyphens. However, the CCYYMMDD date time format has already been part of Integration Advisor since it is frequently used in other Type Systems such as UN/EDIFACT, ASC X12 or SAP IDoc.

Using the Default Namespace in xCBL Payloads

The XML standard allows XML elements (or attributes) to be part of a namespace, requiring a namespace declaration. xCBL messages use this option with the special case of default namespace. To illustrate this, let us look at an XML payload example of the xCBL Order message:

The root node of this message contains the namespace declaration xmlns="rrn:org.xcbl:schemas/xcbl/v3_5/xcbl35.xsd". No namespace prefix is used for this namespace and therefore it is called a default namespace. All payload elements (such as Order, OrderHeader or OrderIssueDate) don't carry a namespace prefix but are implicitly part of this declared default namespace.

In Integration Advisor, under the tab Namespaces, this namespace is set as the default namespace:

Moreover, in the Structure tab (for either Message or MIG), selecting a node allows you to view its properties. In the Details tab, under the Identifier section, you will find the following technical details:

  • Namespace Prefix: shown as <default>
  • XML Node Name: does not show a namespace prefix, consistent with how it is used in a message payload.

Refer below screenshot for an example.

 

Conclusion

With this content and feature update you can now build your Message Implementation Guidelines (MIGs) and Mapping Guidelines (MAGs) based on the xCBL Message Standard. You get an end-to-end solution where you can view and customize xCBL messages in Integration Advisor and process such messages in Cloud Integration.

Further reading

https://blogs.sap.com/2021/09/28/integration-advisor-overview-of-components-for-building-b2b-integra...

https://blogs.sap.com/2018/07/13/integration-content-advisor-create-a-customized-interface-using-mig...

entry.title: Application Decisions for HR Strategy and Planning
entry.content:
Summary

This article seeks to provide guidance on defining the most suitable target application architecture to support HR Strategy and Planning needs of an organization in the Business Domain of Human Resources.

With SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA both delivering solution capabilities around HR Strategy and Planning, enterprises now have multiple applications to choose from and need to make their selection by comparing their organization’s business capability requirements to the solution capabilities SAP applications offer.

Licensing aspects of the solution components discussed should be considered during target architecture design and are beyond the scope of this evaluation.

Business Requirements

Typical variety of business capabilities and supporting applications that altogether constitute HR Strategy and Planning can be seen in the illustration below:

 

 

Solution Options

Typical deployment choices for HR Strategy and Planning for most common cases are the following:

  • SAP SuccessFactors is SAP’s strategic Public Cloud HCM system operated as Software as a Service and includes the newest and future proof innovations for workforce management with a powerful HR information system and extensive self-service and workflow capabilities. Integral part is SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics as the overall solution for all reporting, workforce analytics, and workforce planning in the SAP SuccessFactors HCM suite. It includes the SuccessFactors Workforce Analytics which empowers you to quickly and accurately answer questions about your workforce to influence business decisions with data-driven insights and an evidence-based approach to HR. Whereas the SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) solution and SAP SuccessFactors solutions are bidirectionally integrated, so you can e.g. use the latest HR data to build workforce plans and once completed transfer the results to a financial planning model within SAC. Another possibility for the Public Cloud HCM system is to use the broad capabilities of the SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone where you can access relevant business applications and processes, information, and communications from a single entry point.
  • You can also use HR Reporting with the proven SAP FIORI UI as part of SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE which is the successor of HCM in SAP ERP 6 with all advantages of a private cloud environment and the flexibility and extensibility known from the classical HCM solution. It can either be run in an integrated ERP scenario together with Finance and Logistics or separated in a standalone HCM scenario. Alternatively, you can connect your HCM system with SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) or an SAP BW/4HANA system as the data warehouse layer.
  • Another option is to keep the existing SAP ERP 6 (not lower than Enhancement Pack 6) until 2027 (with mainstream maintenance) or 2030 (with extended maintenance option at additional cost) and use the classical HCM Analytics, then migrate to SAP S/4HANA Release 2023 or higher and activate the business function for HCM for S/4HANA (H4S4). Please see SAP Note 3091160 for further details.

Criteria to determine the most suitable target solution

The following questions are seen to be crucial to determine the most suitable target solution and to define the course:

  1. Do you want to keep your existing HCM solution by SAP for longer?
  2. Do you have any policies or regulations preventing you from using a public cloud solution?
  3. Have you been planning to use an enterprise-wide Analytics solution?

Decision Tree

Conclusion

  • The SAP SuccessFactors solution with its various Reporting and Analytics solutions is proven to be the best choice in case you need to adopt SAP HCM innovation at maximum speed and are already running and taking advantage of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central and/or SAP SuccessFactors Talent Management solutions.
  • The deployment choice SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition or RISE Edition offers the highest degree of flexibility with highly complex and customized process flows. In addition, it is the alternative for Public Cloud solutions, if there are regulations or policies in your organization preventing to store employee data in public cloud solutions.
  • Depending on corporate policies and business requirements SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud or RISE can either co-host HCM functionality in the integrated S/4HANA scenario or a standalone HCM instance, as required.
  • ERP version 6 is guaranteed to be under extended maintenance for HCM solutions through 2030 after which you must migrate to one of the options listed above. Most commonly, transition from ERP HCM to HCM for S/4HANA is being conducted by a system conversion (known as “Brownfield” transition approach)

Look out to similar decision accelerators in other HR scenarios (e.g., HR Administration, Talent Management etc.) in the adjacent articles in this community.

Should you need subject matter expertise from SAP with regards to this or other architecture decisions, please feel free to ask your Technical Quality Manager or your Account Executive at SAP.

entry.title: Re: How to Handle Mass Role "assign site" in workzone
entry.content: I couldn’t find a separate API specifically for assigning sites. While I did see a role-assignment request triggered from the frontend application through the browser’s developer console (F12), it doesn’t appear to be a standard API. Therefore, since no standard API endpoint is provided, it seems risky to rely on that method for creating an automated assignment script.

entry.title: Operations Tab in PM Notification
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

Is it possible in SAP PM Notification to have a Tab for Operations, similar to PM Orders.

Also, can we have a checkbox (Manual) in the operations for completion of the operations.

Prashant

entry.title: Re: Sysdate On default Prompt Date on SAP Universe
entry.content: Hi Macgyver, I would like to know how to do it. I'm still using UDT

entry.title: Re: Future of Electronic Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Release of 4X8
entry.content:
Got these two questions from a colleague:

 

  1. If the customer is currently on S/4HANA 2023 FPS01, do they need to obtain additional license to use 4X8?  If required, is it the "Cash Application Integration" license?
  2. If the customer upgrades to S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 or FPS03, I understand it will be free to use these capabilities. And license is only required when they use Cash Application Integration, scope item 1MV for intelligent technology in Receivables Line-Item Matching, according to HelpPortal  Bank Statement Processing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition - S/4HANA 2023 FPS02?

 

My answer:

 

1. no additional scope is needed, the Cash Application scope item is not relevant for the processing rules

2. this is right yes

 

 

Best,

Edrilan

entry.title: Re: Material Substitution in SAP Sales Cloud v1
entry.content:
Dear Marc,

Good day!

From the error, we could see that it seems the Category ZTAN for Product 1000 is not defined in C4C.
Please kindly go to:
Products >> Product Categories
to check for the Product Category maintained in this C4C tenant.

If any further issues, we would suggest to raise a case to support team as this may need involvement from both Product and Integration team.

Thank you!

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: Get the data from RFC BAPI Result
entry.content: Are you sure that RAL logs the values of parameters received and sent by RFC function modules?

entry.title: Depreciation start date is taking month beginning date irrespective of asset capitalization/purchase
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In S4Hana public cloud for depreciation key LINS depreciation start date is currently defaulting to the first day of the month, rather than the actual purchase date. Once the asset is acquired I have edited the start of depreciation date but depreciation planned values are not changing according to the depreciation start date.

Please advice how I can resolve this.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Leading zeros in product master
entry.content:
Hello @Hans_van_Essen 

You can switch on material number leading zeros in the OMSL configuration with "lexicographical" checkbox. Make sure to read carefully documentation to the SPRO entry: Logistics - General -> Material Master -> Basic Settings -> Define Output Format of Material Numbers

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP message error VL312 during an inbound delivery cr...
entry.content:
Hello @JuanR27 

SAP standard inbound delivery type EL is customized with DL order type:

DL order type has to be set up in VOV8. For whatever reason your inbound delivery type is set up with ZDL order type, which doesn't exist in VOV8. You have to customize it there.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: CAP using subqueries for case separation
entry.content: I'm glad it worked

entry.title: Re: Disable visit check-in button if not in range?
entry.content: Hello, Good day 🙂 You may try with: Open Adaptation Mode >> Choose Check-In button >> Rule, and assign a rule to the visibility of the button according to your business need. Thank you! Best Regards, Molly

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Context Help in SAP Enable Now Producer 2406
entry.content: Hi Barth, thanks for your answer. I already configured the context.html with the help of the instruction "How to configure context sensitive help". However, I'm not able to select any parameters, that should be included in the context file (for instance: LANGU, TCODE, MANDT, DBYSS, PROGRAM, DYNPRO, SYSID). With your hint PullContexts=1 I was able to reappear the Export Context File menu but the "Export Context File - Parameter" is missing. Do you know how to solve this issue?

entry.title: Re: issue with GR/IR account
entry.content:
Hello @AnilKumarNaidu 

If you are sure that the remaining 4 pcs won't be invoice, you can clear GR/IR account with MR11.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Juniya B

Isabelle.

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
with the current version "join with internal tab" is not allowed. syntax error for me.

yeah..at application layer level can be achieved. it is just not just one query with stock will have similar queries for other aggregations like open orders quantity, forecast etc.. so trying to achieve by CDS at DB level itself as data would be huge.

entry.title: UDM - SuccessFactors Recruiting - FO and GO location object
entry.content:
Hello, I have enabled UDM for client that uses location FO for recruiting. I created additional location GO for career site purpose. I have some question regarding "hybrid mode":

  1. If we map location FO with location GO, will it change anything in career site UI? What is the purpose and benefits from this mapping? How can we map them? Do they need to have exactly same naming?
  2. How do we handle existing postings after UDM enablement (FO based)? They are not searchable by location. Does UDM affect them in anyway? How can we update them with location GO object? 
  3. We have 4 requisition templates, only one with EC and location FO. Other three uses text fields for location. Can we switch it to location GO? How does it affect internal career site?

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite Trace Level is not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I faced the same Tracing-issue in Chrome and it worked again after Undeploy - Deploy , instead of just Restarting the IFlow. Maybe that helps!
( I also disabled CPI-Helper add-on, but I am not sure if that relates to this issue)

BR., Walter.

entry.title: Re: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Hello, 

The RASD information is usually available a few days after the publication of the preliminary documentation. It should be available now. 

Best,

Diana

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
Hi,@David_Chaviano I am unable to redeem this campaign code because of this error, i followed all instructions in the video to how to redeem my code but in this phase i faced this problem to not let me continue my process to redeem code.

REQUEST: I am requesting you manually redeem my code on behalf of my account

PROGRAM NAME is Digital Skills Initiative digitalskills@sap.com

TROUBLESHOOTING: I did tried to switch browser from chrome to Internet explorer edge, Cleared cache and again sign in, tried also on mobile. nothing working.

entry.title: Re: Creating a URL to connect a dashboard to an Order in...
entry.content: we want to be able to create a generated link from our dashboard to the certain order in 4Hana so that they can make changes directly instead of having to go through copy and pasting. Now is the question is it possible to generate such a link to sap 4hana and if so how ?

entry.title: Migrate your data: FI - Accounts payable open item
entry.content: "I want to upload supplier payments using the 'Migrate Your Data' app with the template: FI- Accounts Payable Open Item. Although I have filled in the house bank value and the account details ID of the house bank, when I reach the simulate step, the system shows an error as shown in the image below. Is there any way to resolve this error?"
